title: Freya Ridings: A Singer's Brave Journey
summary: Freya Ridings is a singer who became famous with her first album. She felt very nervous and had panic attacks when making her second album. She was forced to work with big producers in studios that made her uncomfortable. Her record label changed, and her manager left, making things hard. Freya felt scared and lost her confidence. She decided to buy a plane ticket to take control of her career. Now, she is making music her own way and feeling better. This story shows how artists can face challenges and find their voice again.

sudden feelings of fear that can make it hard to breathe
people who help make music in a studio
a company that helps musicians release their music
a ticket to travel on an airplane

questions.correct_answer: They can face challenges and find their voice

background_read: Freya Ridings is a British singer-songwriter who became famous with her first album in 2017. She sings ballads and pop songs. Making music can be tough, and sometimes artists feel pressure from others. This article talks about how Freya overcame her fears to keep making music she loves.
Article_Structure: WHAT: She faced nervousness and challenges while making her second album, but took control by buying a plane ticket
WHERE: In recording studios and her career
WHY: To show how artists can overcome difficulties and reclaim their confidence

perspectives.description: Freya felt scared and lost her confidence due to pressure from producers and changes in her team.
